final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo for a music school named "Studio Gitare Požarevac".

风格/媒介: flat vector logo design, minimalistic, modern, professional music branding
构图:
  stylized guitar element integrated creatively with typography
  works well in both horizontal and centered layout
  clean background, high contrast
主体: logo for "Studio Gitare Požarevac" — a guitar studio and music education brand
场景/背景: clean / transparent background
光线/氛围: premium, trustworthy, creative feel
色彩方案: elegant palette — black, white, dark blue, or warm wood tones; no bright or neon colors
材质/纹理:
文字(原样): Studio Gitare Požarevac
约束:
  typography must be clear, slightly artistic but highly readable
  include subtle musical elements (strings, sound waves, or notes) only if they fit naturally
  subtle local identity touch inspired by Požarevac — minimal, not cliché
  scalable vector style, suitable for print and social media
避免: overly complex details, bright or neon colors, cliché musical clip-art
